function.message: I couldn't complete this inbox request because one of the five requested files does not exist: 50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_19__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md. Please confirm whether this is a typo or provide the correct fifth file path.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, read 99_system workflows before task work, read OCR and migration guidance plus finance schema, and honored the inbox-processing update that says not to leave partial edits when the task is not doable.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requests OCR for five specific purchase-note paths. The migration workflow says to stop and ask for clarification instead of guessing when required work cannot be supported, and inbox-processing-v2-update says to avoid partial edits if the task is not doable. The exact fifth path failed to read and a find under 50_finance/purchases found no matching file, so completing all five requested items would require guessing or silently skipping one.
